paragraphs.source: The 2000s brought the internet age, with the emergence of Web 2.0, e-mail, e-commerce, Google search, smartphones with 3G broadband data, and the need for datacenter CPUs to serve the world’s internet traffic as everything went online. Datacenter CPUs grew into a multi-billion dollar segment. On the design front, after the GHz wars were over with the end of Dennard scaling, attention shifted to multi-core CPUs and increased integration. AMD integrated the memory controller into the CPU silicon, and high-speed IO (PCIe) came directly from the CPU as well. Multi-core CPUs were especially suited for datacenter workloads, where many tasks could be run in parallel across different cores.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The 2000s brought the internet age, with the emergence of Web 2.0, e-mail, e-commerce, Google search, smartphones with 3G broadband data, and the need for datacenter CPUs to serve the world’s internet traffic as everything went online. Datacenter CPUs grew into a multi-billion dollar segment. On the design front, after the GHz wars were over with the end of Dennard scaling, attention shifted to multi-core CPUs and increased integration. AMD integrated the memory controller into the CPU silicon, and high-speed IO (PCIe) came directly from the CPU as well. Multi-core CPUs were especially suited for datacenter workloads, where many tasks could be run in parallel across different cores.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The 2000s brought the internet age, with the emergence of Web 2.0, e-mail, e-commerce, Google search, smartphones with 3G broadband data, and the need for datacenter CPUs to serve the world’s internet traffic as everything went online. Datacenter CPUs grew into a multi-billion dollar segment. On the design front, after the GHz wars were over with the end of Dennard scaling, attention shifted to multi-core CPUs and increased integration. AMD integrated the memory controller into the CPU silicon, and high-speed IO (PCIe) came directly from the CPU as well. Multi-core CPUs were especially suited for datacenter workloads, where many tasks could be run in parallel across different cores.

pro.text: 21 世纪初迎来了互联网时代。Web 2.0、电子邮件、电子商务、谷歌搜索以及支持 3G 宽带数据的智能手机相继涌现。随着万物触网，数据中心 CPU 必须承担起处理全球互联网流量的重任，并随之成长为一个价值数十亿美元的细分市场。在设计层面，随着登纳德缩放定律走向终结，“主频大战”偃旗息鼓，业界的注意力转向了多核 CPU 与更高的集成度。AMD 将内存控制器直接集成到 CPU 裸片中，高速 I/O（PCIe）也改为直接由 CPU 提供。多核 CPU 格外契合数据中心工作负载，能让大量任务在不同核心上并行处理。

applied_terms: Translate 'Dennard scaling' as '登纳德缩放定律'.
Ensure 'GHz wars' reflects the historical context (主频大战).
Use standard industry acronyms alongside their Chinese equivalents for 'SMT' (同步多线程) and 'QPI' (快速通道互联).

understanding.role_in_article: Explains the architectural pivot from frequency scaling to multi-core designs driven by the internet boom and physical semiconductor limits.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Shows how the foundational PC-era architectures had to adapt to the massive traffic scaling of Web 2.0.
understanding.relation_to_next: Sets the stage for the virtualization era, as having multiple cores and threads enabled the partitioning of physical servers into virtual ones.
key_points: The end of Dennard scaling forced the industry to abandon frequency increases (GHz wars) in favor of multi-core CPU designs.
Simultaneous Multi-Threading (SMT) and integrated memory controllers were introduced to maximize throughput for parallelizable internet workloads.
Multi-socket servers (using QPI) became necessary to meet the insatiable demand for compute.
translation_notes: Translate 'Dennard scaling' as '登纳德缩放定律'.
Ensure 'GHz wars' reflects the historical context (主频大战).
Use standard industry acronyms alongside their Chinese equivalents for 'SMT' (同步多线程) and 'QPI' (快速通道互联).

issues.description: 中英文之间缺少空格（CJK-Latin spacing）。
前文将“Multi-socket”翻译为行业标准的“多路”，但后文将“sockets”翻译为“插槽”。

paragraphs.source: We will detail the evolution of how these multiple cores are connected in the interconnect section below. Simultaneous Multi-Threading (SMT) was also introduced in this time by both AMD and Intel, partitioning a core into two logical threads that could operate independently while sharing most core resources, further improving performance in parallelizable datacenter workloads. Those looking for more performance would turn to Multi-socket CPU servers, with Intel’s Quick Path Interconnect (QPI) and AMD’s HyperTransport Direct Connect Architecture in their Opteron CPUs providing coherent links between up to eight sockets per server.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: We will detail the evolution of how these multiple cores are connected in the interconnect section below. Simultaneous Multi-Threading (SMT) was also introduced in this time by both AMD and Intel, partitioning a core into two logical threads that could operate independently while sharing most core resources, further improving performance in parallelizable datacenter workloads. Those looking for more performance would turn to Multi-socket CPU servers, with Intel’s Quick Path Interconnect (QPI) and AMD’s HyperTransport Direct Connect Architecture in their Opteron CPUs providing coherent links between up to eight sockets per server.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: We will detail the evolution of how these multiple cores are connected in the interconnect section below. Simultaneous Multi-Threading (SMT) was also introduced in this time by both AMD and Intel, partitioning a core into two logical threads that could operate independently while sharing most core resources, further improving performance in parallelizable datacenter workloads. Those looking for more performance would turn to Multi-socket CPU servers, with Intel’s Quick Path Interconnect (QPI) and AMD’s HyperTransport Direct Connect Architecture in their Opteron CPUs providing coherent links between up to eight sockets per server.

pro.text: 我们将在下文的互连架构章节详细剖析多核连接方式的演进历程。AMD 和英特尔也在这一时期引入了同步多线程 (SMT) 技术。该技术将一个物理核心划分为两个逻辑线程，两者在共享大部分核心资源的同时能够独立运行，从而进一步提升了可并行化数据中心工作负载的性能。对性能有更高要求的用户则会转向多路 CPU 服务器。英特尔的快速通道互联 (QPI) 与 AMD 皓龙 CPU 采用的 HyperTransport直连架构，能够在单台服务器中为多达八个插槽提供一致性链路。
